subject: [PATCH v5 2/2] selftests/firmware: add search path test for firmware_class.search=

2026-03-23.patch_summary: This patch adds a new selftest, fw_search.sh, to validate the firmware_class.search= module parameter. The test covers various scenarios such as firmware found in different search directories, not found in any path, and edge cases like escaped characters in directory names. It also checks that path= takes priority over search=. The test uses the existing sysfs trigger interface of the test_firmware module to write and read values from sysfs.
